branches.draftBodyPreview:
Dear Auditor proof HAPPY-AUDITOR-PROOF-1775492244585,

Thank you so much—we're thrilled you're leaning in this direction!

I'm happy to confirm: the **Elite collection** secures your December 6, 2026 Tuscany date with a **30% retainer** when the contract is signed, and **engagement-session travel within 50 miles of Florence is included** as part of that offering.

If you're ready to move forward this week, I'll send over the contract and payment details right away. Once we have your signed agreement and retainer, your date is officially held and we can start planning the finer details together.

Please let me know if you'd like me to email the paperwork today, or if you have any other questions before we proceed.

Warmly,

[Studio Manager]
[Studio Name]
[Contact Information]
